case_title: COSINO DOMINGO VS FROMAN LORALIE ANN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY COSINO DOMINGO AS TO DEFENDANT FROMAN LORALIE ANN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-09-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
1. CRIMINAL TRIAL SCHEDULED 10/30/92. 2. COMPLAINT AMENDED ADDING ELIZIER COSINO OWNER OF AUTO AS PLAINTIFF.
TRIAL RESET TO DEC-16-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FROMAN LORALIE ANN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COSINO DOMINGO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FROMAN LORALIE ANN $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $515.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
